---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a tool, flag, or behavior change
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What troubleshooting scenario does the current arnie not handle well, or handle awkwardly? Concrete is better than abstract — describe the moment you wished arnie did something different.

## Proposed solution

What you'd like arnie to do. If it's a new tool, describe the input/output shape you'd want. If it's a flag, describe the default behavior change.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about and why they don't fit.

## Additional context

Screenshots, sample sessions, links to the docs/issue/etc. that motivated this.
